body:
## Summary

Integrates the V1-V5 commercial operating system backup (`dealix-v1v5backup.zip`) into the repo, **additively** — no existing files were overwritten. Sourced from the user's backup ZIP, merged on a dedicated review branch per the explicit instruction to **not merge to `main` directly**.

**Scope:** 752 files changed, ~116K insertions. Adds web pages, API routers/middleware/security, business OS layers, founder operator scripts, doctrine tests, CI workflows, reports tree, and supporting libraries.

## What's added

- **Web pages** (`apps/web/app/*`): brand, cases, command-center, daily-draft, data-room, delivery-os, kpi-finance, lead-engine, offers, partner-room, persuasion-room, pipeline, pricing, revenue-machine, sales-assets, war-room, automated-sales, client-acquisition, plus `/api` routes (analytics, company-os, sales-machine).
- **API surface**: middleware (`ip_allowlist`, `metrics`, `privileged_audit`), security (`mfa`, `mfa_policy`, `oidc`, `saml`, `scim`), routers (`commercial_ops_router`, `payments_router`).
- **Business OS** (`business/*`): acquisition, ai, analytics, brand, ceo, client-portal, closing, conversion, crm, data-room, delivery, finance, governance, industries, launch, lead-lists, legal-lite, offers, persuasion, pricing, proof, proposals, reports, retention, review, sales-automation, sales-machine, scoring + `_data`, `_generated`.
- **Founder operator scripts**: `dealix_daily_operator`, `dealix_v4_run_all`, `dealix_v5_run_all`, all the `generate_*` scripts (board pack, CEO brief, dashboard data, proposal, quote, ops health, retention risk, weekly review, etc.), verifiers (`verify_company_os`, `verify_dealix_ultimate_os`, `verify_sales_machine`, …), and approval gates (`approve_outreach_draft`, `reject_outreach_draft`, `mark_*`).
- **Doctrine tests**: `test_no_auto_send`, `test_no_guaranteed_revenue_claims`, `test_commercial_claim_safety`, `test_pricing_requires_approval`, `test_payment_handoff_requires_approval`, `test_proposal_requires_qualified_opportunity`, `test_walk_away_rules`, `test_whatsapp_safety_gates`, `test_outbound_safety_gates`, `test_partner_model_margin_rules`, `test_customer_success_handoff_required`, `test_agent_permission_safety`, `test_commercial_offer_mapping`, `test_payment_pricing_safety`.
- **CI workflows**: `agentic-security-gate.yml`, `client-acquisition-delivery-check.yml`, `dealix-ultimate-os-check.yml`.
- **Reports tree** across 30+ domains.
- Other: `learning_flywheel/`, `self_evolving_os/`, `intelligence_os` additions, `templates/contracts`, `autonomous_growth` (api, case_study_pipeline, content_calendar, seo_cluster_engine, social_proof_aggregator).

## Fixes that were required to land cleanly

- `apps/web/tsconfig.json` — added `baseUrl: "."` + `paths: { "@/*": ["./*"] }`. Without this `next build` failed on every `@/lib/*` import the new pages depend on.
- `apps/web/app/lead-engine/page.tsx` — corrected the import: `PERSUASION_ANGLES` lives in `lib/sales-automation/lead-sources`, not `lib/sales-machine/ultimate-sales-os`. Without this typecheck failed.

## Hygiene

Excluded from the merge: `.pytest_cache/`, `.ruff_cache/`, `.worktrees/`, `.mavis/`, `node_modules/`, `.next/`, `__pycache__/`.

## Verification (all green on this branch before commit)

| Check | Result |
| --- | --- |
| `python3 scripts/check_no_secrets.py` | ✅ No secrets found |
| `python3 scripts/verify_dealix_ultimate_os.py` | ✅ verification passed |
| `python3 scripts/dealix_daily_operator.py --mode demo` | ✅ 7/7 steps OK |
| `python3 scripts/production_readiness_check.py` | ✅ 5/5 checks passed |
| `cd apps/web && npm install` | ✅ 135 packages installed |
| `npm run typecheck` | ✅ clean |
| `npm run build` | ✅ all new pages built (static + dynamic /api routes) |

## Do NOT merge until

- CI on this PR is green end-to-end (this PR adds three new workflows, plus the existing `ci.yml`).
- Required reviewers approve. Given the size (752 files), reviewing in slices by top-level dir is recommended.

## Test plan

- [ ] CI green on this PR (all required gates: doctrine, security, ultimate-os check, client-acquisition delivery check, agentic security gate).
- [ ] `npm run build` on a fresh clone of this branch.
- [ ] Spot-check a few of the new pages render in dev (`npm run dev` then open `/lead-engine`, `/command-center`, `/pipeline`).
- [ ] Run `pytest tests/test_no_auto_send.py tests/test_no_guaranteed_revenue_claims.py tests/test_pricing_requires_approval.py` to confirm the new doctrine gates fire.
- [ ] Confirm none of the existing files on `main` were modified outside the two intentional fixes above.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CiamJCEcmQ9RQUTk7BHtst

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01CiamJCEcmQ9RQUTk7BHtst)_

commits.messageBody:
Adds Dealix commercial OS layers, sales machine, CRM assets, founder
operator scripts, governance docs, and daily execution tooling.

Sourced from the V1-V5 backup (dealix-v1v5backup.zip). Integrated
additively — no existing files were overwritten — and verified end-
to-end on this branch before opening for review.

Highlights
- Web app pages: brand, cases, command-center, daily-draft, data-room,
  delivery-os, kpi-finance, lead-engine, offers, partner-room,
  persuasion-room, pipeline, pricing, revenue-machine, sales-assets,
  war-room, automated-sales, client-acquisition, plus /api routes.
- API surface: middleware (ip_allowlist, metrics, privileged_audit),
  security (mfa, mfa_policy, oidc, saml, scim), routers
  (commercial_ops_router, payments_router).
- Business OS: acquisition, ai, analytics, brand, ceo, client-portal,
  closing, conversion, crm, data-room, delivery, finance, governance,
  industries, launch, lead-lists, legal-lite, offers, persuasion,
  pricing, proof, proposals, reports, retention, review,
  sales-automation, sales-machine, scoring, and supporting _data,
  _generated.
- Founder operator scripts: dealix_daily_operator, dealix_v4_run_all,
  dealix_v5_run_all, generate_* (board pack, client brief, conversion
  scorecard, daily CEO brief, delivery plan, expansion offer,
  followup queue, founder dashboard, launch brief, monthly client
  review, ops health, outreach drafts, proof report, proposal,
  prospect pack, quote, retention risk, sales call notes,
  sales machine pack, ultimate sales OS pack, weekly command,
  weekly operating review, workflow review agenda), verifiers
  (verify_company_os, verify_crm_pipeline, verify_dealix_ultimate_os,
  verify_delivery_os, verify_sales_machine, verify_ultimate_sales_os,
  verify_client_acquisition_delivery_os), and approval gates
  (approve_outreach_draft, reject_outreach_draft, mark_*).
- Doctrine tests: no_auto_send, no_guaranteed_revenue_claims,
  commercial_claim_safety, commercial_offer_mapping,
  agent_permission_safety, payment_handoff_requires_approval,
  payment_pricing_safety, pricing_requires_approval,
  proposal_requires_qualified_opportunity, walk_away_rules,
  whatsapp_safety_gates, customer_success_handoff_required,
  outbound_safety_gates, partner_model_margin_rules.
- CI workflows: agentic-security-gate, client-acquisition-delivery-
  check, dealix-ultimate-os-check.
- Reports tree expanded across 30+ domains (ai_governance, ai_ops,
  analytics, business_os, commercial, customer_success,
  data_governance, data_products, data_room, enterprise,
  enterprise_sales, execution, final, finance, infra, legal,
  localization, offers, operator, ops, outreach, partnerships,
  privacy, procurement, product, productized_services, security,
  whatsapp).
- learning_flywheel/, self_evolving_os/, intelligence_os additions,
  templates/contracts, autonomous_growth (api, case_study_pipeline,
  content_calendar, seo_cluster_engine, social_proof_aggregator).

Fix
- apps/web/tsconfig.json: add baseUrl + paths "@/*" so the @/ alias
  imports the new pages depend on resolve. Without this, `next build`
  fails on multiple modules (lib/company-os, lib/sales-machine,
  lib/sales-automation, lib/generated/*).
- apps/web/app/lead-engine/page.tsx: fix wrong import — PERSUASION_ANGLES
  lives in lib/sales-automation/lead-sources, not lib/sales-machine/
  ultimate-sales-os. Without this, typecheck errors.

Hygiene
- Excluded from the merge: .pytest_cache, .ruff_cache, .worktrees,
  .mavis, node_modules, .next, __pycache__.

Verification (all green on this branch)
- python3 scripts/check_no_secrets.py            -> No secrets found
- python3 scripts/verify_dealix_ultimate_os.py   -> verification passed
- python3 scripts/dealix_daily_operator.py --mode demo -> 7/7 steps OK
- python3 scripts/production_readiness_check.py  -> 5/5 checks passed
- (cd apps/web && npm install && npm run typecheck && npm run build)
  -> typecheck clean; build succeeded with all new pages prerendered.

Do NOT merge to main until CI is green on this PR.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CiamJCEcmQ9RQUTk7BHtst
commits.messageHeadline: feat: add Dealix V1-V5 commercial operating system

commits.messageBody:
The root .gitignore line 42 has `lib/` from the standard Python build-
artifact list. That pattern was too broad — it also caught apps/web/lib/,
silently dropping the TypeScript modules every new page imports
(@/lib/company-os/*, @/lib/sales-machine/*, @/lib/sales-automation/*,
@/lib/generated/*).

Two CI jobs failed on PR #713 because of this:
- "Next.js web verify" — typecheck reported TS2307 for every @/lib/* import
  even though apps/web/tsconfig.json defines the alias correctly.
- "verify" (verify_client_acquisition_delivery_os.py) — reported
  MISSING apps/web/lib/company-os/company-os.ts.

Fix: add `!apps/web/lib/` and `!apps/web/lib/**` immediately after the
Python `lib/` rule so it un-ignores only the web app's lib directory and
leaves the Python build pattern intact everywhere else.

This commit also adds the six previously-ignored TypeScript files that
the new pages depend on:
- apps/web/lib/analytics/events.ts
- apps/web/lib/company-os/company-os.ts
- apps/web/lib/company-os/pipeline.ts
- apps/web/lib/generated/founder-dashboard.ts
- apps/web/lib/sales-automation/lead-sources.ts
- apps/web/lib/sales-machine/ultimate-sales-os.ts

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CiamJCEcmQ9RQUTk7BHtst
commits.messageHeadline: fix(gitignore): scope Python lib/ pattern so apps/web/lib/ lands

reviews.body: CodeQL found more than 20 potential problems in the proposed changes. Check the [Files changed](/Dealix-sa/dealix/pull/713/files) tab for more details.

title: feat: add Dealix V1-V5 commercial operating system
